# Project Instructions for GitHub Copilot

## Language
All code, comments, and documentation should be written in English unless specified otherwise.

## Agent Dispatch
This project uses secondary agents for specialized tasks. When working on code that involves databases, testing, documentation, security, performance, DevOps, code review, or UI/UX, use the corresponding agent from `.github/agents/`.

## Skills
Project skills are available in `.github/skills/`. The agent will load them automatically when the task matches their description.
